data.body: ROUND 3 — semantic clarity (commit 3355c92b + docs). Addressed Joe's 'I can't see what the workflow DOES' feedback, all browser-verified: (1) start+end events (entry/exit visible); (2) branch gateway LABELLED with its when-condition + flows labelled 'then (true)'/'else (false)'; panel adds read-only Condition field; (3) agent prompt TEXT resolved server-side (reviewer/.rebar/prompts) + shown read-only in panel; (4) DATA-LOSS FIX: plain bpmn:task (palette default) now maps to scripted instead of being dropped — this is why 'testaroo' vanished (saved file == pre-save .bak both times); (5) config textarea gains a JSON format hint. Parallel fan-out (fetch->{commits,graph}) explained as standard BPMN parallel split. Unit + browser-E2E guards added; 230 tests green. The else-contains-then confusion is correct nesting (escalate_gate is a nested branch inside the else arm, with its own then) — now legible via labels.
